candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line for recent years; preferred over totals because it is the most semantically specific reported revenue line.
Looks like a subtotal equal to insurance service result rather than revenue, so not preferred for top-line.
Non-insurance income subtotal, not overall revenue.
Explicit total revenue line; useful as fallback for years where revenue label/reporting changed.
Includes expense and is not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income is not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income is not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income is not revenue.

variables.notes: Use as priority list, not sum. 'Insurance revenue' is the best current-period revenue line; 'Total Revenue' is fallback for earlier reporting format (notably 2021).

candidates.why: Best available direct cost line for an insurer in recent years; appears to capture core insurance service costs below insurance revenue.
Direct claims cost for 2021, but narrower than total insurance service expenses and only present in older format.

variables.notes: Candidate list was empty. Chose outside candidate from preview because for an insurer 'Insurance service expenses' is the closest analogue to cost of sales/direct service costs. Manual review recommended because insurer presentation does not map cleanly to traditional COGS and 2021 uses a different format with 'Claims incurred' and other expense buckets.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component; directly fits SG&A-type personnel expense.
Headcount metric, not an expense row.

candidates.row_label: Net finance income or expenses and operating expenses from investment contracts
candidates.why: Contains finance items and operating expenses mixed together; not a clean SG&A row.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the cleanest overhead component from candidates and excluded mixed finance/operating rows and non-expense balance-sheet metrics.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Could capture total financing cost in older format, but less granular than available interest rows in newer years.
Broad financing cost line for recent years, but underlying interest rows are available and preferred to avoid non-interest items where possible.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Most direct recurring interest expense row; preferred core XINT component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component on lease liabilities; should be included with core interest expense.
Not a finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure duplicating the lease interest line; avoid double counting.
Balance-sheet asset/other asset component, not interest expense.
Equity item, not finance cost.
Equity item, not finance cost.
Liability balance, not expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest-expense components and excluded broader finance totals and supplemental duplicate disclosure to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not equity balance.
Component of equity, not total parent equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, exactly as required.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when parent equity is available.
Share count, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income attribution line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Direct balance-sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance-sheet label and useful fallback, but appears duplicate of NCI row.
Income statement attribution, not balance-sheet equity.

candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not minority equity balance.
